title: Correct Is Not Enough: Training Reasoning Planners with Executor-Grounded Rewards
authors: Tianyang Han, Hengyu Shi, Junjie Hu, Xu Yang, Zhiling Wang, Junhao Su
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has become a common way to improve explicit reasoning in large language models, but final-answer correctness alone does not reveal whether the reasoning trace is faithful, reliable, or useful to the model that consumes it. This outcome-only signal can reinforce traces that are right for the wrong reasons, overstate reasoning gains by rewarding shortcuts, and propagate flawed intermediate states in multi-step systems. To this end, we propose TraceLift, a planner-executor training framework that treats reasoning as a consumable intermediate artifact. During planner training, the planner emits tagged reasoning. A frozen executor turns this reasoning into the final artifact for verifier feedback, while an executor-grounded reward shapes the intermediate trace. This reward multiplies a rubric-based Reasoning Reward Model (RM) score by measured uplift on the same frozen executor, crediting traces that are both high-quality and useful. To make reasoning quality directly learnable, we introduce TRACELIFT-GROUPS, a rubric-annotated reason-only dataset built from math and code seed problems. Each example is a same-problem group containing a high-quality reference trace and multiple plausible flawed traces with localized perturbations that reduce reasoning quality or solution support while preserving task relevance. Extensive experiments on code and math benchmarks show that this executor-grounded reasoning reward improves the two-stage planner-executor system over execution-only training, suggesting that reasoning supervision should evaluate not only whether a trace looks good, but also whether it helps the model that consumes it.
title_zh: 正确并不足够：基于执行器的奖励训练推理规划器
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习已成为提升大型语言模型显式推理能力的常用方法，但仅关注最终答案的正确性并不能揭示推理过程是否忠实、可靠或对后续模型使用具有实际价值。这种仅以结果为导向的信号可能强化那些“因错误原因而正确”的推理路径，通过奖励捷径夸大推理进展，并在多步系统中传播有缺陷的中间状态。为此，我们提出TraceLift——一种规划-执行训练框架，将推理过程视为可被消耗的中间产物。在规划器训练阶段，规划器生成带有标签的推理过程；一个固定的执行器将该推理转化为最终产物以获取验证器反馈，同时，基于执行器的奖励机制塑造中间推理轨迹。该奖励将基于评分标准的推理奖励模型（RM）得分与同一固定执行器上测得的性能提升相乘，从而奖励那些既高质量又真正有用的推理路径。为使推理质量可直接学习，我们构建了TRACELIFT-GROUPS：一个基于数学和代码种子问题的、由评分标准标注的仅含推理过程的数据集。每个样本包含一组同题例题，其中包含一条高质量参考推理路径，以及多个合理但存在局部缺陷的推理路径，这些缺陷会降低推理质量或解题支持度，同时保持任务相关性。在代码和数学基准上的大量实验表明，这种基于执行器的推理奖励显著优于仅依赖执行结果的训练方式，这表明推理监督不仅应评估推理路径“看起来”是否良好，更应考察其是否真正帮助了下游模型的使用。

title: Geographic Variation in Stack Overflow Code Quality: Evidence from a Cross-Regional Study of Coding Practices
authors: Elijah Zolduoarrati, Sherlock A. Licorish, Nigel Stanger
abstract: Developers frequently reuse Stack Overflow code snippets, yet the quality of these snippets remains unevenly understood, particularly across programming languages and geographic contexts. This study investigates code quality in Stack Overflow answers from contributors located in the United States, focusing on SQL, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, and Java snippets. We evaluate four quality dimensions: reliability, readability, performance, and security. Using language-specific linting and static analysis tools, we quantify violations across states and cities, compute violation densities to enable fair regional comparison, and examine relationships between code quality and state-level diversity indicators. We further conduct inductive content analysis on code snippets from California, Utah, and North Dakota to identify qualitative patterns in code quality violations. Results show that readability violations are the most prevalent across all languages, followed by reliability, performance, and security. Common issues include improper whitespace, inconsistent formatting, program-flow errors, inefficient resource use, unsanitised inputs, and insecure dynamic evaluation. Regional analysis indicates that major technology hubs produce more parsable snippets but do not necessarily exhibit higher violation densities. States with broader access to computing devices, Internet subscriptions, higher income, and more equitable wealth distribution tend to show fewer code quality violations. Qualitative findings suggest that established technology regions often produce more complex violations, while less mature technology regions display more fundamental errors. These findings highlight the socio-technical nature of code quality in community question-answering platforms and suggest that developers should exercise caution when reusing online code snippets.
title_zh: Stack Overflow 代码质量的地理差异：来自跨区域编码实践研究的证据
abstract_zh:
开发者经常复用 Stack Overflow 上的代码片段，但这些片段的质量在不同编程语言和地理背景下的理解却参差不齐。本研究聚焦于来自美国开发者的 Stack Overflow 回答，分析 SQL、JavaScript、Python、Ruby 和 Java 五种语言的代码片段质量。我们从可靠性、可读性、性能和安全性四个维度进行评估。通过使用针对各语言的 lint 工具与静态分析工具，量化了各州及城市中的代码违规情况，计算出违规密度以实现公平的区域比较，并探讨了代码质量与州级多样性指标之间的关联。此外，我们对加利福尼亚州、犹他州和北达科他州的代码片段进行了归纳式内容分析，以识别代码质量违规的定性模式。

研究结果表明，在所有语言中，可读性违规最为普遍，其次为可靠性、性能和安全性问题。常见问题包括缩进不当、格式不一致、程序流程错误、资源利用效率低下、输入未经过清理以及存在不安全的动态求值操作。区域分析显示，主要科技中心产生的代码更易于解析，但其违规密度并不一定更高。那些拥有更广泛计算设备普及率、更高互联网接入率、更高收入水平以及更均衡财富分配的州，往往表现出较少的代码质量问题。定性分析发现，成熟技术地区常出现更复杂的违规行为，而技术发展较不成熟的地区则更多表现为基础性错误。

这些发现揭示了社区问答平台中代码质量所具有的社会技术属性，提示开发者在复用在线代码片段时应保持谨慎。

title: Backtrackable Inprocessing
authors: Alexander Nadel
abstract: We introduce Backtrackable Inprocessing (BI), a framework that enables applying inprocessing under the current trail at any decision level, at any point during incremental SAT solving. Our approach lifts the long-standing restriction that inprocessing must be performed only at the global decision level, thereby substantially increasing its potential effectiveness. We focus on three highly efficient core techniques: subsumption, self-subsuming resolution, and Bounded Variable Elimination (BVE). We show how to ensure sound backtracking in the presence of inprocessing, and demonstrate that applying BI for incremental preprocessing after propagating assumptions yields significant performance improvements on Bounded Model Checking (BMC) benchmarks from the Hardware Model Checking Competition 2017. Implemented in the Island SAT solver (IntelSAT's fork), BI enables solving $\sim$1.5$\times$ as many difficult bounds as the baseline global-level incremental preprocessor.
title_zh: 可回溯的内处理
abstract_zh: 我们提出了可回溯的内处理（Backtrackable Inprocessing, BI）框架，该框架使得在增量SAT求解过程中的任意决策层级、任意时刻均可应用内处理技术。我们的方法打破了长期以来内处理仅能在全局决策层级执行的限制，从而显著提升了其潜在的有效性。我们重点研究了三种高效的核心技术：归约、自归约消解以及有界变量消除（Bounded Variable Elimination, BVE）。我们展示了如何在存在内处理的情况下确保正确的回溯机制，并证明在传播假设后使用BI进行增量预处理，能够在2017年硬件模型检测竞赛的有界模型检测（BMC）基准上带来显著的性能提升。该技术已实现在Island SAT求解器（IntelSAT的分支版本）中，相比基线的全局层级增量预处理器，BI能够求解约1.5倍数量的复杂实例。

title: Probabilistic-bit Guided CDCL for SAT Solving using Ising Consensus Assumptions
authors: Melki Bino
abstract: Boolean satisfiability (SAT) solvers are widely used in hardware verification, cryptanalysis, automatic test-pattern generation, and side-channel reasoning workflows. Modern conflict-driven clause-learning (CDCL) solvers are highly effective, but satisfiable instances may still require substantial conflict analysis and Boolean propagation before identifying productive regions of the search space. This paper studies a hybrid SAT-solving framework in which a probabilistic-bit (p-bit) Ising sampler proposes high-agreement literals that are passed to CDCL as temporary assumptions. The goal is not to replace CDCL, but to evaluate whether stochastic low-violation samples can reduce CDCL internal search effort while retaining correctness through CDCL fallback. On selected controlled-backbone random 3-SAT benchmarks, the hybrid method reduces median conflicts by 80.8-85.5% and median propagations by 80.2-84.6% relative to pure CDCL. The observed benefit is distribution-sensitive, suggesting that p-bit guidance is effective only for certain instance classes. We further report exploratory machine-learning gates that estimate when hybrid solving is likely to help. On the selected run, a random-forest gate retains 94.8% of hybrid wins, indicating that lightweight gating may help avoid unproductive hybrid calls.
title_zh: 基于伊辛共识假设的随机位引导CDCL求解SAT问题
abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性（SAT）求解器广泛应用于硬件验证、密码分析、自动测试模式生成以及侧信道推理等流程中。现代基于冲突驱动的子句学习（CDCL）求解器虽然非常高效，但在处理可满足实例时，仍可能需要大量的冲突分析和布尔传播，才能识别出搜索空间中有价值的区域。本文提出一种混合SAT求解框架：利用概率比特（p-bit）伊辛采样器生成高一致性的文字，并将其作为临时假设传递给CDCL求解器。该方法的目标并非取代CDCL，而是评估随机性低违反样本是否能够减少CDCL内部的搜索开销，同时通过CDCL的回退机制保证结果的正确性。在选定的受控骨干随机3-SAT基准测试集上，该混合方法相较于纯CDCL，平均冲突次数减少了80.8%至85.5%，平均传播次数减少了80.2%至84.6%。所观察到的性能提升具有分布敏感性，表明p-bit引导仅对特定类型的实例有效。此外，我们还初步探索了基于机器学习的门控机制，用于预测混合求解是否可能带来收益。在一次实验中，一个随机森林门控模型保留了94.8%的混合求解优势，表明轻量级的门控机制有助于避免无效的混合调用。

title: Two Calls, Two Moments, and the Vote-Accuracy Curve of Repeated LLM Inference
authors: Yi Liu
abstract: Repeated sampling is a standard way to spend test-time compute, but its benefit is controlled by the latent distribution of correctness across examples, not by one-call accuracy alone. We study the binary correctness layer of repeated LLM inference under conditional-i.i.d. calls. One labeled call identifies the mean latent success probability; two labeled calls identify its second moment and hence the same-example correctness correlation that separates stable errors from recoverable call-level randomness. From these two moments, every fixed majority-vote budget has a sharp distribution-free two-call interval. The key technical reduction is that the infinite-dimensional moment problem has three-atom extremizers and quadratic dual certificates for every finite budget, so the bounds are exact rather than discretized or parametric. The first useful budget, three votes, has a closed form, width at most $1/8$, and a certified-improvement criterion. The infinite-vote endpoint is the limit of majority voting as the number of calls tends to infinity; it is also sharply bounded, but remains threshold-sensitive because it depends on latent mass around $q=1/2$. We add maximum-entropy and Latent-difficulty Gaussian-probit (LDGP) point completions, and experiments on LLM calls over QNLI and QQP show that empirical three- and five-vote accuracies are contained in the projected two-call regions while temperature changes and randomized model mixtures can create voting gains not ordered by one-call accuracy.
title_zh: 两次调用、两个时刻与重复大模型推理的准确率曲线
abstract_zh: 重复采样是利用测试阶段计算资源的一种标准方法，但其收益受样本间正确性潜在分布的制约，而非仅由单次调用的准确率决定。本文研究在条件独立同分布（conditional-i.i.d.）调用假设下，大语言模型（LLM）重复推理中的二元正确性层。一次有标签调用可识别潜在成功概率的均值；两次有标签调用则能确定其二阶矩，从而揭示同一示例的正确性相关性，区分稳定错误与可恢复的调用级随机性。基于这两个矩，对于任意固定的多数投票预算，均可导出一个精确的、无分布假设的两调用区间。关键技术突破在于：无限维矩问题具有三原子极值解，并且对每个有限预算存在二次型对偶证书，因此所得边界为精确值，而非离散化或参数化近似。首个具有实用价值的预算——三次投票——具有闭式表达，区间宽度不超过 $1/8$，并具备可验证的改进判据。无穷次投票的极限情形对应于调用次数趋于无穷时多数投票的极限行为，该极限同样被严格界定，但依然对阈值敏感，因其依赖于潜在质量集中在 $q=1/2$ 附近的程度。我们引入最大熵和潜在难度高斯-概率（LDGP）点补全方法，并在 QNLI 和 QQP 数据集上的 LLM 调用实验表明，经验性的三次与五次投票准确率均落在投影后的两调用区间内；而温度调整和随机模型混合等操作可产生超越单次调用准确率排序的投票增益。

title: When to Think, When to Speak: Learning Disclosure Policies for LLM Reasoning
authors: Jiaqi Wei, Xuehang Guo, Pengfei Yu, Xiang Zhang, Wanli Ouyang, Siqi Sun, Qingyun Wang, Chenyu You
abstract: In single-stream autoregressive interfaces, the same tokens both update the model state and constitute an irreversible public commitment. This coupling creates a \emph{silence tax}: additional deliberation postpones the first \emph{task-relevant} content, while naive early streaming risks premature commitments that bias subsequent generations. We introduce \textbf{\emph{Side-by-Side (SxS)}} Interleaved Reasoning, which makes \emph{disclosure timing} a controllable decision within standard autoregressive generation. SxS interleaves partial disclosures with continued private reasoning in the same context, but releases content only when it is \emph{supported} by the reasoning so far. To learn such pacing without incentivizing filler, we construct entailment-aligned interleaved trajectories by matching answer prefixes to supporting reasoning prefixes, then train with SFT to acquire the dual-action semantics and RL to recover reasoning performance under the new format. Across two Qwen3 architectures/scales (MoE \textbf{Qwen3-30B-A3B}, dense \textbf{Qwen3-4B}) and both in-domain (AIME25) and out-of-domain (GPQA-Diamond) benchmarks, SxS improves accuracy--\emph{content-latency} Pareto trade-offs under token-level proxies (e.g., inter-update waiting).
title_zh: 何时思考，何时说话：学习大型语言模型推理中的披露策略
abstract_zh: 在单流自回归接口中，相同的标记既用于更新模型状态，又构成不可逆的公开承诺。这种耦合带来了所谓的“沉默税”：额外的思考会推迟首个**任务相关**内容的出现，而过早的流式输出则可能引发过早承诺，从而对后续生成造成偏差。我们提出了**并行推理（Side-by-Side, SxS）**，一种可控制披露时机的交错推理机制，使其成为标准自回归生成中的可控决策。SxS 在同一上下文中交错进行部分披露与持续的私有推理，但仅当内容得到当前推理过程充分支持时才予以释放。为学习这种节奏而不鼓励填充性内容，我们通过将答案前缀与支撑推理前缀对齐，构建出蕴含蕴含关系的交错轨迹，并采用监督微调（SFT）来习得双重语义功能，再通过强化学习（RL）恢复新格式下的推理性能。在两种 Qwen3 架构/规模（MoE 版本 **Qwen3-30B-A3B**，密集版本 **Qwen3-4B**）以及两类基准测试（领域内：AIME25；域外：GPQA-Diamond）上，SxS 均显著提升了准确率与延迟之间的帕累托权衡表现，尤其是在基于 token 级代理指标（如更新间等待时间）的评估中。

title: The Right Answer, the Wrong Direction: Why Transformers Fail at Counting and How to Fix It
authors: Gabriel Garcia
abstract: Large language models often fail at simple counting tasks, even when the items to count are explicitly present in the prompt. We investigate whether this failure occurs because transformers do not represent counts internally, or because they cannot convert those representations into the correct output tokens. Across three model families, Pythia, Qwen3, and Mistral, ranging from 0.4B to 14B parameters, we find strong evidence for the second explanation. Linear probes recover the correct count from intermediate layers with near-perfect accuracy ($R^2>0.99$), showing that the information is present. However, the internal directions that encode counts are nearly orthogonal to the output-head rows for digit tokens ($|\cos|\leq0.032$). In other words, the model stores the count in a form that the digit logits do not naturally read out. We localize this failure with two interventions. Updating only the digit rows of the output head (36,864 parameters) substantially improves constrained next-token digit prediction (60.7 to 100.0% across four tasks), but it does not fix autoregressive generation. By contrast, a small LoRA intervention on attention Q/V weights (7.67M parameters) improves upstream routing and achieves 83.1% +/- 7.2% in true greedy autoregressive generation. Logit-lens measurements confirm the mechanism: the correct digit's vocabulary rank drops from 55,980 to 1, a 50,000x improvement. Additional norm, logit-lens, and cross-task analyses show that the bottleneck generalizes across character counting, addition, and list length, while remaining absent from broader multi-step reasoning benchmarks, including MMLU, GSM8K, and DROP. These results identify counting failure as a geometric readout bottleneck rather than a failure of internal representation: the model knows the count but the output pathway is geometrically misaligned with the tokens needed to express it.
title_zh: 正确的答案，错误的方向：为什么Transformer在计数上会失败以及如何解决
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型在执行简单的计数任务时经常失败，即使需要计数的项目明确出现在提示中。我们探究这种失败的原因究竟是因为Transformer架构内部不表示数量信息，还是因为无法将这些表示正确转换为输出的词元。通过对三个不同模型系列——Pythia、Qwen3和Mistral——从0.4B到14B参数规模的广泛研究，我们发现第二个解释具有强有力的证据支持。

线性探测（linear probes）在中间层几乎完美地恢复了正确的计数结果（$R^2 > 0.99$），表明数量信息确实存在于模型内部。然而，编码计数信息的内部方向与输出头中表示数字词元的行之间几乎正交（$|\cos| \leq 0.032$）。换句话说，模型以一种输出头的数字logits无法自然读取的形式存储了计数信息。

我们通过两种干预手段定位了这一失败机制。仅更新输出头中的数字词元行（仅36,864个参数）显著提升了受限的下一个词元数字预测性能（在四个任务中从60.7%提升至100.0%），但并未解决自回归生成的问题。相比之下，在注意力机制的Q/V权重上施加一个小型LoRA干预（767万个参数），改善了上游信息路由，使真正的贪婪自回归生成准确率达到83.1% ± 7.2%。

Logit-lens测量进一步验证了该机制：正确数字在词汇表中的排名从55,980降至1，实现了超过5万倍的提升。额外的归一化分析、logit-lens分析以及跨任务测试表明，这一瓶颈在字符计数、加法运算和列表长度等任务中普遍存在，但在更广泛的多步推理基准测试中则不存在，包括MMLU、GSM8K和DROP。

这些结果揭示，计数失败并非源于内部表征的缺失，而是一种几何读出瓶颈：模型“知道”正确的数量，但输出路径在几何上与表达该数量所需的词元严重错位。

title: Exploring Sustainability in Scientific Software through Code Quality & Test Coverage Metrics
authors: Sheikh Md. Mushfiqur Rahman, Gregory R. Watson, Nasir U. Eisty
abstract: Context: Scientific open-source software (SciOSS) plays a foundational role in research and engineering, yet its long-term sustainability has often been overlooked and remains a significant concern. Objective: This study investigates the long-term sustainability of SciOSS through code and test quality metrics. Method: We analyze CASS Software Portfolio projects, classifying them by sustainability and comparing their code structure, test coverage, and links between code quality and testing across the dataset. Results: Sustainable projects show higher, more consistent test coverage and clearer code-test correlations, while unsustainable ones show weaker patterns. Overall, test coverage is low in scientific software, and high complexity and coupling reduce testability. Conclusion: In this study, we present a practical, data-driven approach for assessing sustainability in scientific software, offering a foundation for evaluating long-term software health and supporting future efforts in quality assurance and sustainability monitoring.
title_zh: 通过代码质量与测试覆盖率指标探索科学软件的可持续性
abstract_zh:
背景：科学开源软件（SciOSS）在科研与工程领域中发挥着基础性作用，但其长期可持续性长期以来被忽视，仍是亟待解决的重要问题。  
目标：本研究通过代码与测试质量指标，探讨SciOSS的长期可持续性。  
方法：我们分析了CASS软件组合项目，根据可持续性对项目进行分类，并比较其代码结构、测试覆盖率以及代码质量与测试之间的关联性。  
结果：具有可持续性的项目表现出更高的、更稳定的测试覆盖率，且代码与测试之间具有更清晰的关联性；而不可持续的项目则呈现出较弱的模式。总体而言，科学软件的测试覆盖率普遍偏低，高复杂度和高耦合性会降低可测试性。  
结论：本研究提出了一种实用且基于数据的方法，用于评估科学软件的可持续性，为衡量软件长期健康状况提供了基础，并有助于未来在质量保证与可持续性监测方面的努力。

title: Generating Proof-of-Vulnerability Tests to Help Enhance the Security of Complex Software
authors: Shravya Kanchi, Xiaoyan Zang, Ying Zhang, Danfeng Yao, Na Meng
abstract: Developers create modern software applications (Apps) on top of third-party libraries (Libs). When library vulnerabilities are reachable through application code, the applications can be vulnerable to software supply chain attacks. Prior work shows that developers often require concrete and executable evidence, i.e., proof-of-vulnerability (PoV) tests, to decide whether a reported dependency vulnerability poses a practical security risk to their application. However, manually crafting such tests is challenging, and existing tool support is insufficient to automate the procedure. To streamline test generation, we created PoVSmith -- a new approach that combines call path analysis, exemplar test, code context, and feedback into multiple prompts to guide a coding agent (i.e., Codex) and a large language model (i.e., GPT) for test generation, execution, and assessment. We evaluated PoVSmith on 33 $\langle$App, Lib$\rangle$ Java program pairs, where each App depends on a vulnerable Lib. PoVSmith revealed 158 unique application-level entry points (i.e., public methods) calling vulnerable library APIs; 152 (96\%) of them were correctly found, together with the call paths properly recognized. With such method call information, PoVSmith generated 152 tests, 84 (55\%) of which demonstrated feasible ways of attacking Apps by exploiting Lib vulnerabilities. PoVSmith substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art LLM-based approach, as it reduces human involvement while dramatically improving test quality. Our work contributes (1) a novel approach of agent-based test generation, (2) an iterative code refinement process driven by execution feedback, and (3) LLM-based quality assessment grounded in both the test context and execution logs.
title_zh: 生成漏洞证明测试以帮助提升复杂软件的安全性
abstract_zh:
开发者在第三方库（Libs）的基础上构建现代软件应用（Apps）。当库中的漏洞可通过应用代码访问时，这些应用就可能面临软件供应链攻击的风险。以往的研究表明，开发人员通常需要具体且可执行的证据——即漏洞证明（PoV）测试——来判断报告的依赖项漏洞是否对其应用构成实际安全威胁。然而，手动编写此类测试具有挑战性，而现有的工具支持也难以自动化这一过程。为简化测试生成，我们提出了 PoVSmith —— 一种新方法，通过结合调用路径分析、示例测试、代码上下文以及执行反馈，生成多个提示（prompts），以指导编码代理（如 Codex）和大型语言模型（如 GPT）完成测试的生成、执行与评估。

我们在 33 对 $\langle$App, Lib$\rangle$ Java 程序对上评估了 PoVSmith，每对中 App 均依赖于一个存在漏洞的库。PoVSmith 共识别出 158 个独特的应用层入口点（即公共方法），这些入口点会调用存在漏洞的库 API；其中 152 个（占 96%）被正确发现，并且调用路径也得到了准确识别。基于这些方法调用信息，PoVSmith 生成了 152 个测试，其中有 84 个（占 55%）展示了通过利用库漏洞攻击应用的可行方式。PoVSmith 显著优于当前最先进的基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法，不仅大幅减少了人工干预，还显著提升了测试质量。

我们的工作贡献包括：（1）一种基于代理的测试生成新方法；（2）一种由执行反馈驱动的迭代式代码优化流程；（3）一种基于测试上下文和执行日志的 LLM 驱动的质量评估机制。

title: MOSAIC-Bench: Measuring Compositional Vulnerability Induction in Coding Agents
authors: Jonathan Steinberg, Oren Gal
abstract: Coding agents often pass per-prompt safety review yet ship exploitable code when their tasks are decomposed into routine engineering tickets. The challenge is structural: existing safety alignment evaluates overt requests in isolation, leaving models blind to malicious end-states that emerge from sequenced compliance with innocuous-looking requests. We introduce MOSAIC-Bench (Malicious Objectives Sequenced As Innocuous Compliance), a benchmark of 199 three-stage attack chains paired with deterministic exploit oracles on deployed software substrates (10 web-application substrates, 31 CWE classes, 5 programming languages) that treats both exploit ground truth and downstream reviewer protocol as first-class evaluation axes. On this benchmark, nine production coding agents from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Moonshot, Zhipu, and Minimax compose innocuous tickets at 53-86% end-to-end ASR with only two refusals across all staged runs. In a matched direct-prompt experiment over four frontier Claude/Codex agents, vulnerable-output rates fall to 0-20.4%: Claude primarily refuses, while Codex primarily hardens rather than emitting the vulnerable implementation - ticket staging silences both defense modes simultaneously. Downstream, code reviewer agents approve 25.8% of these confirmed-vulnerable cumulative diffs as routine PRs, and a full-context implementation protocol closes only 50% of the staged/direct gap, ruling out context fragmentation as the sole explanation. As a deployable but non-adaptive mitigation, reframing the reviewer as an adversarial pentester reduces evasion across the evaluated reviewer subset; pentester framed evasion ranges from 3.0% to 17.6%, and an open-weight Gemma-4-E4B-it reviewer under this framing detects 88.4% of attacks on the dataset with a 4.6% false-positive rate measured on 608 real-world GitHub PRs.
title_zh: MOSAIC-Bench：衡量编码代理的组合性漏洞诱导能力
abstract_zh:
编码代理在单次提示的安全审查中通常表现合格，但在将任务分解为常规工程工单后，仍会交付可被利用的代码。这一挑战具有结构性：现有的安全对齐评估仅孤立地审查显式请求，使模型无法察觉那些由一系列看似无害的请求逐步合规所导致的恶意最终状态。为此，我们提出了 MOSAIC-Bench（Malicious Objectives Sequenced As Innocuous Compliance，恶意目标以无害合规形式序列化）基准，包含 199 个三阶段攻击链，并配以部署软件底座上的确定性漏洞检测器（涵盖 10 个 Web 应用底座、31 种 CWE 类型、5 种编程语言），将漏洞真实情况与下游评审协议均作为核心评估维度。

在该基准测试中，来自 Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、Moonshot、Zhipu 和 Minimax 的九个生产级编码代理，在三阶段任务分解下，以 53%–86% 的端到端攻击成功率（ASR）生成看似无害的工单，且在整个阶段运行过程中仅有两次拒绝行为。而在针对四款前沿 Claude/Codex 代理的直接提示对照实验中，产生漏洞输出的比例降至 0%–20.4%：Claude 主要选择拒绝，而 Codex 则倾向于强化实现而非输出漏洞代码——然而，当采用工单分阶段机制时，这两种防御模式同时失效。在后续环节中，代码评审代理将 25.8% 的已确认存在漏洞的累积变更（diff）批准为常规 Pull Request；即使采用完整上下文的实现协议，也仅能缩小约一半的阶段式与直接提示之间的差距，排除了上下文碎片化作为唯一解释的可能性。

作为一种可部署但非自适应的缓解方案，将评审者重新定位为对抗性渗透测试员，可显著降低攻击绕过率。在所评估的评审代理子集中，经此框架调整后的规避率降至 3.0% 至 17.6%；其中，采用开放权重的 Gemma-4-E4B-it 评审模型在此设定下，对数据集中的攻击检测率达到 88.4%，在 608 个真实 GitHub Pull Request 上测得的误报率仅为 4.6%。

title: Contextual Multi-Objective Optimization: Rethinking Objectives in Frontier AI Systems
authors: Jie Zhou, Qin Chen, Liang He
abstract: Frontier AI systems perform best in settings with clear, stable, and verifiable objectives, such as code generation, mathematical reasoning, games, and unit-test-driven tasks. They remain less reliable in open-ended settings, including scientific assistance, long-horizon agents, high-stakes advice, personalization, and tool use, where the relevant objective is ambiguous, context-dependent, delayed, or only partially observable. We argue that many such failures are not merely failures of scale or capability, but failures of objective selection: the system optimizes a locally visible signal while missing which objectives should govern the interaction. We formulate this problem as \emph{contextual multi-objective optimization}. In this setting, systems must consider multiple, context-dependent objectives, such as helpfulness, truthfulness, safety, privacy, calibration, non-manipulation, user preference, reversibility, and stakeholder impact, while determining which objectives are active, which are soft preferences, and which must function as hard or quasi-hard constraints. These examples are not intended as an exhaustive taxonomy: different domains and deployment settings may activate different objective dimensions and different conflict-resolution procedures. Our framework models AI behavior as a context-dependent choice rule over candidate actions, objective estimates, active constraints, stakeholders, uncertainty, and conflict-resolution procedures. We outline an implementation pathway based on decomposed objective representations, context-to-objective routing, hierarchical constraints, deliberative policy reasoning, controlled personalization, tool-use control, diagnostic evaluation, auditing, and post-deployment revision.
title_zh: 上下文相关的多目标优化：重新思考前沿人工智能系统中的目标设定
abstract_zh:
前沿人工智能系统在目标清晰、稳定且可验证的环境中表现最佳，例如代码生成、数学推理、游戏以及基于单元测试的任务。然而，在开放性较强的场景中，如科学辅助、长周期智能体、高风险建议、个性化服务和工具使用等，其可靠性则显著下降。这些场景中的目标往往模糊、依赖上下文、延迟显现或仅部分可观测。我们认为，许多此类失败并非单纯源于规模或能力的不足，而是目标选择上的失误：系统优化了局部可见的信号，却未能识别出应主导交互过程的核心目标。

为此，我们提出将该问题建模为**情境化多目标优化**（contextual multi-objective optimization）。在此框架下，系统需同时考虑多个依赖于具体情境的目标，如有用性、真实性、安全性、隐私保护、校准性、非操纵性、用户偏好、可逆性以及对利益相关方的影响等，并动态判断哪些目标处于激活状态，哪些属于软性偏好，哪些必须作为硬约束或准硬约束来执行。需要强调的是，上述列举并非详尽无遗的分类体系；不同应用领域与部署环境可能激活不同的目标维度，采用各异的冲突解决机制。

我们的框架将人工智能行为建模为一种基于情境的选择规则，该规则综合考量候选行动方案、目标估计值、活跃约束条件、利益相关方、不确定性因素以及冲突解决策略。我们进一步提出了一个实现路径，包括：分解式的目标表示、上下文到目标的路由机制、分层约束设计、审慎的策略推理、受控的个性化处理、工具使用的管控、诊断性评估、审计机制以及部署后的持续修订。

title: TRACE: A Metrologically-Grounded Engineering Framework for Trustworthy Agentic AI Systems in Operationally Critical Domains
authors: Serhii Zabolotnii
abstract: We introduce TRACE, a cross-domain engineering framework for trustworthy agentic AI in operationally critical domains. TRACE combines a four-layer reference architecture with an explicit classical-ML vs. LLM-validator split (L2a/L2b), a stateful orchestration-and-escalation policy (L3), and bounded human supervision (L4); a metrologically grounded trust-metric suite mapped to GUM/VIM/ISO 17025; and a Model-Parsimony principle quantified by the Computational Parsimony Ratio (CPR). Three instantiations--clinical decision support, industrial multi-domain operations, and a judicial AI assistant--transfer the samearchitecture and metrics across principally different governance contexts. The L2a/L2b separation makes the use of large language models a deliberate design decision rather than an architectural default, with parsimony quantified through CPR. TRACE introduces CPR as a first-class design principle in trustworthy-AI engineering.
title_zh: TRACE：一种基于计量学的工程框架，用于在操作关键领域中实现可信的代理型人工智能系统
abstract_zh: 我们提出TRACE，一种面向操作关键领域中可信代理型人工智能的跨域工程框架。TRACE结合了四层参考架构与显式的经典机器学习模型与大语言模型验证器分离机制（L2a/L2b），状态感知的编排与升级策略（L3），以及有限的人工监督（L4）；基于计量学原理的可信度量体系，映射至GUM、VIM及ISO 17025标准；并引入模型简约性原则，通过计算简约性比率（CPR）进行量化。该框架在三个不同应用场景中得到验证：临床决策支持、工业多领域运营以及司法AI助手，实现了在根本不同的治理背景下对同一架构与度量体系的迁移应用。L2a/L2b的分离设计使大语言模型的使用成为一种明确的设计选择，而非架构默认配置，其简约性通过CPR实现量化。TRACE首次将CPR作为可信人工智能工程中的核心设计原则。

title: KVerus: Scalable and Resilient Formal Verification Proof Generation for Rust Code
authors: Yuwei Liu, Xinyi Wan, Yanhao Wang, Minghua Wang, Lin Huang, Tao Wei
abstract: Formal verification provides the highest assurance of software correctness and security, but its application to large-scale, evolving systems remains a major challenge. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in automating proof generation, they often fail in real-world settings due to their inability to handle complex cross-module dependencies or changes in the codebase or the verification toolchain. We identify the fundamental problem as the Semantic-Structural Gap: LLMs operate on semantic code patterns, whereas formal verification is governed by rigid structural dependencies, a disconnect that leads to brittle, unsustainable proofs. To bridge this gap, we propose a new paradigm of self-adaptive verification and present KVerus, a retrieval-augmented system for Verus-based Rust verification that can adapt to an evolving software environment. KVerus constructs a dynamic knowledge base of code metadata, lemma semantics, and toolchain specifics. By combining dependency-aware program analysis, semantic lemma indexing, and error-driven self-refinement, it can navigate intricate cross-file dependencies to synthesize proofs and automatically repair proofs when faced with common evolutionary changes. Across three single-file benchmarks, KVerus verifies 80.2% of tasks, outperforming the state-of-the-art AutoVerus (56.9%) and degrades less than AutoVerus under breaking Verus updates. On three repository-level benchmarks with cross-file dependencies, KVerus achieves a 51.0% success rate, compared to 4.5% for a multi-round prompting baseline. Finally, on the Asterinas Rust OS kernel, KVerus produces upstream-accepted proofs that verify 23 previously unverified functions (21.0% of proof code) in the memory-management module. KVerus represents a significant step towards making formal verification a scalable and sustainable practice for modern, security-critical software.
title_zh: KVerus：面向Rust代码的可扩展且具备弹性的形式化验证证明生成
abstract_zh: 形式化验证提供了软件正确性和安全性最高级别的保证，但其在大规模、持续演化的系统中的应用仍面临重大挑战。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化证明生成方面展现出巨大潜力，但在实际场景中往往表现不佳，原因在于它们难以处理复杂的跨模块依赖关系，或应对代码库及验证工具链的变更。我们识别出根本性问题在于“语义-结构鸿沟”：LLMs 依赖于语义层面的代码模式进行推理，而形式化验证则严格依赖于结构性依赖关系，这种脱节导致生成的证明脆弱且难以持续维护。为弥合这一鸿沟，我们提出一种全新的自适应验证范式，并构建了 KVerus——一个基于 Verus 的 Rust 语言形式化验证的检索增强系统，能够适应不断演化的软件环境。KVerus 构建了一个动态的知识库，涵盖代码元数据、定理语义以及工具链细节。通过结合感知依赖的程序分析、语义定理索引与错误驱动的自我精炼机制，它能够有效处理复杂的跨文件依赖关系，自动合成证明，并在面对常见的演化变更时实现证明的自动修复。在三个单文件基准测试中，KVerus 成功验证了 80.2% 的任务，显著优于当前最先进的 AutoVerus（56.9%），且在 Verus 工具链发生破坏性更新时退化程度更低。在包含跨文件依赖关系的三个仓库级基准测试中，KVerus 达到 51.0% 的成功率，远超多轮提示基线（仅 4.5%）。最后，在 Asterinas Rust 操作系统内核上，KVerus 生成的证明已获得上游社区采纳，成功验证了内存管理模块中此前未被验证的 23 个函数（占证明代码总量的 21.0%）。KVerus 标志着迈向可扩展、可持续的形式化验证实践的重要一步，为现代关键安全软件的可靠性保障提供了切实可行的新路径。

title: Agentic-imodels: Evolving agentic interpretability tools via autoresearch
authors: Chandan Singh, Yan Shuo Tan, Weijia Xu, Zelalem Gero, Weiwei Yang, Michel Galley, Jianfeng Gao
abstract: Agentic data science (ADS) systems are rapidly improving their capability to autonomously analyze, fit, and interpret data, potentially moving towards a future where agents conduct the vast majority of data-science work. However, current ADS systems use statistical tools designed to be interpretable by humans, rather than interpretable by agents. To address this, we introduce Agentic-imodels, an agentic autoresearch loop that evolves data-science tools designed to be interpretable by agents. Specifically, it develops a library of scikit-learn-compatible regressors for tabular data that are optimized for both predictive performance and a novel LLM-based interpretability metric. The metric measures a suite of LLM-graded tests that probe whether a fitted model's string representation is "simulatable" by an LLM, i.e. whether the LLM can answer questions about the model's behavior by reading its string output alone. We find that the evolved models jointly improve predictive performance and agent-facing interpretability, generalizing to new datasets and new interpretability tests. Furthermore, these evolved models improve downstream end-to-end ADS, increasing performance for Copilot CLI, Claude Code, and Codex on the BLADE benchmark by up to 73%
title_zh: 代理型模型：通过自主研究演进的代理可解释性工具
abstract_zh: 代理型数据科学（ADS）系统正迅速提升其自主分析、拟合和解释数据的能力，有望在未来实现由智能体主导绝大部分数据科学工作。然而，当前的ADS系统所使用的统计工具主要是为人类可解释性设计的，而非面向智能体的可解释性。为解决这一问题，我们提出了“代理型模型”（Agentic-models），一种能够自我演进的数据科学工具开发循环，专门设计用于生成对智能体友好的可解释性工具。具体而言，该系统构建了一个与scikit-learn兼容的表格数据回归器库，这些模型在预测性能和一项基于大语言模型（LLM）的新可解释性度量之间实现了优化平衡。该度量通过一系列由LLM评分的测试来评估一个已拟合模型的字符串表示是否具备“可模拟性”——即LLM仅通过阅读模型的字符串输出，就能回答关于模型行为的问题。实验结果表明，经过演化后的模型在预测性能和面向智能体的可解释性方面均得到显著提升，并能泛化至新的数据集和新的可解释性测试。此外，这些演化出的模型显著提升了下游端到端的ADS系统表现，在BLADE基准测试中，使Copilot CLI、Claude Code和Codex的性能最高提升了73%。

title: FINER-SQL: Boosting Small Language Models for Text-to-SQL
authors: Thanh Dat Hoang, Thanh Trung Huynh, Matthias Weidlich, Thanh Tam Nguyen, Tong Chen, Hongzhi Yin, Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen
abstract: Large language models have driven major advances in Text-to-SQL generation. However, they suffer from high computational cost, long latency, and data privacy concerns, which make them impractical for many real-world applications. A natural alternative is to use small language models (SLMs), which enable efficient and private on-premise deployment. Yet, SLMs often struggle with weak reasoning and poor instruction following. Conventional reinforcement learning methods based on sparse binary rewards (0/1) provide little learning signal when the generated SQLs are incorrect, leading to unstable or collapsed training. To overcome these issues, we propose FINER-SQL, a scalable and reusable reinforcement learning framework that enhances SLMs through fine-grained execution feedback. Built on group relative policy optimization, FINER-SQL replaces sparse supervision with dense and interpretable rewards that offer continuous feedback even for incorrect SQLs. It introduces two key reward functions: a memory reward, which aligns reasoning with verified traces for semantic stability, and an atomic reward, which measures operation-level overlap to grant partial credit for structurally correct but incomplete SQLs. This approach transforms discrete correctness into continuous learning, enabling stable, critic-free optimization. Experiments on the BIRD and Spider benchmarks show that FINER-SQL achieves up to 67.73\% and 85\% execution accuracy with a 3B model -- matching much larger LLMs while reducing inference latency to 5.57~s/sample. These results highlight a cost-efficient and privacy-preserving path toward high-performance Text-to-SQL generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/thanhdath/finer-sql.
title_zh: FINER-SQL：提升小规模语言模型的文本到SQL能力
abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型推动了文本到SQL生成的重大进展。然而，它们存在计算成本高、延迟长以及数据隐私问题，使得在许多实际应用场景中难以落地。一个自然的替代方案是使用小型语言模型（SLMs），其能够实现高效且私密的本地部署。但SLMs通常面临推理能力弱和指令遵循性差的问题。传统的基于稀疏二值奖励（0/1）的强化学习方法，在生成的SQL错误时提供的学习信号微弱，导致训练过程不稳定甚至崩溃。为克服这些问题，我们提出了FINER-SQL——一种可扩展、可复用的强化学习框架，通过细粒度的执行反馈来增强SLMs的表现。该框架基于组相对策略优化，将稀疏监督替换为密集且可解释的奖励机制，即使在SQL生成错误时也能提供连续的反馈。它引入了两个关键奖励函数：记忆奖励（memory reward），用于对齐推理过程与已验证的执行轨迹，以保证语义稳定性；原子奖励（atomic reward），通过衡量操作级别的重叠程度，对结构正确但不完整的SQL给予部分得分。这一方法将离散的正确性判断转化为连续的学习过程，实现了稳定且无需判别器的优化。在BIRD和Spider基准上的实验表明，FINER-SQL使用30亿参数模型即可达到最高67.73%和85%的执行准确率，性能媲美更大规模的LLM，同时将推理延迟降低至每样本5.57秒。这些结果展示了低成本、高隐私保护的高性能文本到SQL生成新路径。我们的代码已开源，地址为：https://github.com/thanhdath/finer-sql。

title: Robust Agent Compensation (RAC): Teaching AI Agents to Compensate
authors: Srinath Perera, Kaviru Hapuarachchi, Frank Leymann, Rania Khalaf
abstract: We present Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm (providing a safety net) implemented through an architectural extension that can be applied to most Agent frameworks to support reliable executions (avoiding unintended side effects). Users can choose to enable RAC without changing their current agent code (e.g., LangGraph agents). The proposed approach can be implemented in most existing agent frameworks via their existing extension points. We present an implementation based on LangChain, demonstrate its viability through the $τ$-bench and REALM-Bench, and show that when solving complex problems, RAC is 1.5-8X or more better in both latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.
title_zh: 稳健代理补偿（RAC）：教导人工智能代理进行补偿
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于日志的恢复范式——鲁棒代理补偿（Robust Agent Compensation, RAC），通过架构扩展实现，可为大多数代理框架提供安全保障，支持可靠的执行过程（避免意外副作用）。用户无需修改现有代理代码（例如LangGraph代理）即可选择启用RAC。该方法可通过现有代理框架的扩展点，在大多数现有框架中实现。我们基于LangChain实现了该方案，并通过τ-bench和REALM-Bench验证了其可行性。实验结果表明，在解决复杂问题时，RAC在延迟和令牌经济性方面均比当前最先进的基于大语言模型的恢复方法提升1.5至8倍或更多。

title: Design and Implementation of BNN-Based Object Detection on FPGA
authors: Xuyu Zhao, Yunpeng Wu, Mengyuan Zhu, Haoyu Huang, Xiaoyu Xu, Yanjing Li, Gaolong Zhang, Baochang Zhang
abstract: This paper implements a Binary Neural Network (BNN) based YOLOv3-tiny-like object detector on a low-cost FPGA. The network takes 320*320*3 RGB images as input. Its main convolution layers use 1-bit weights and 8-bit activations, while Conv1 and the final detection head use fixed-point standard convolutions. From the trained ONNX model, weights, biases, and quantization parameters are extracted, converted to fixed point, packed into COE files, and stored in Vivado BRAM ROMs. The hardware is written fully in Verilog RTL and includes padding, line buffering, binary convolution, quantization post-processing, max pooling, and detection-head computation. For layers where Mul_prev is indexed by input channel and Div_current by output channel, Mul_prev is fused in-to the BNN PE so that channel-wise compensation is applied during accumulation. On VOC, the model obtains 39.6% mAP50 with 0.098 GFLOPs and 0.74 M parameters. RTL simulation shows that the final raw detection output reaches a correlation coefficient of 0.999964 and a mean absolute error of 0.020027 against the corresponding ONNX node.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的BNN目标检测的设计与实现
abstract_zh: 本文在低成本FPGA上实现了一种基于二值神经网络（BNN）的YOLOv3-tiny类目标检测器。该网络以320×320×3的RGB图像作为输入，其主要卷积层采用1比特权重和8比特激活值，而第一层卷积（Conv1）及最终的检测头则使用定点标准卷积。从训练好的ONNX模型中提取权重、偏置和量化参数，将其转换为定点格式，并打包成COE文件，存储于Vivado的BRAM ROM中。硬件部分完全采用Verilog RTL编写，包含填充、行缓冲、二值卷积、量化后处理、最大池化以及检测头计算等功能。对于Mul_prev按输入通道索引、Div_current按输出通道索引的层，将Mul_prev融合进BNN处理单元（PE），使得通道补偿在累加过程中得以应用。在PASCAL VOC数据集上，该模型达到39.6%的mAP50，仅需0.098 GFLOPs计算量和0.74M参数量。RTL仿真结果表明，最终原始检测输出与对应ONNX节点之间的相关系数高达0.999964，平均绝对误差仅为0.020027。

title: DECKER: Domain-invariant Embedding for Cross-Keyboard Extraction and Recognition
authors: Bikrant Bikram Pratap Maurya, Nitin Choudhury, Daksh Agarwal, Arun Balaji Buduru
abstract: Acoustic side-channel attacks (ASCA) on keyboards pose a significant security risk, as keystrokes can be inferred from typing acoustics, revealing sensitive information. Prior ASCA studies are limited by small-scale datasets with restricted diversity in users, keyboards, and environments, constraining analysis across devices, microphones, and noise conditions. We introduce HEAR, a dataset designed to study ASCA along three axes: keyboard generalization, noise adaptation, and user bias. HEAR contains recordings from 53 participants using 37 laptop keyboards, collected in three realistic settings: (1) external microphone capture, (2) device microphone capture without network noise, and (3) VoIP-based streaming capture. This enables controlled evaluation across users, keyboards, and environments. On HEAR, we establish an ASCA benchmark spanning conventional features and pre-trained representations from raw audio and spectrograms in unimodal and multimodal settings. We propose DECKER, a domain-invariant keystroke inference framework with four stages: (1) Keyboard Signature Normalization to reduce device coloration, (2) domain-adversarial disentanglement to suppress keyboard identity, (3) supervised cross-keyboard contrastive alignment to enforce key consistency, and (4) Acoustic Style Randomization to synthesize unseen keyboard responses. We further explore sentence-level inference using an LLM-based post-processing layer to refine keystroke sequences via linguistic context. Results on HEAR show DECKER improves keystroke identification over strong baselines, particularly in cross-keyboard and cross-user settings, with further gains from language-model rectification. These findings highlight that ASCA remains effective across diverse users, devices, and noisy environments, underscoring its practical security risk.
title_zh: DECKER：用于跨键盘提取与识别的域不变嵌入
abstract_zh:
键盘的声学侧信道攻击（ASCA）构成重大安全威胁，因为通过分析打字时产生的声音即可推断出按键操作，从而泄露敏感信息。以往的ASCA研究受限于小规模数据集，用户、键盘和环境多样性不足，导致在不同设备、麦克风及噪声条件下难以进行充分分析。为此，我们提出了HEAR数据集，旨在从三个维度研究ASCA：键盘泛化能力、噪声适应性以及用户偏差。HEAR包含53名参与者使用37种笔记本电脑键盘在三种真实场景下的录音数据：（1）外部麦克风采集，（2）设备内置麦克风采集且无网络噪声干扰，（3）基于VoIP的流媒体采集。该设计支持在用户、键盘和环境之间进行受控评估。

基于HEAR，我们建立了一个涵盖传统特征与原始音频及频谱图预训练表示的ASCA基准测试体系，覆盖单模态与多模态设置。我们提出DECKER——一种具有域不变性的按键推断框架，包含四个阶段：（1）键盘特征归一化，以减少设备固有音色的影响；（2）域对抗解耦，抑制键盘身份信息；（3）监督式跨键盘对比对齐，确保按键语义一致性；（4）声学风格随机化，用于合成未见过的键盘响应。此外，我们还探索了基于大语言模型（LLM）的句子级推断方法，利用语言上下文对按键序列进行后处理优化。

在HEAR上的实验结果表明，DECKER在强基线基础上显著提升了按键识别性能，尤其在跨键盘和跨用户场景中表现突出，结合语言模型修正后进一步提升效果。这些发现表明，ASCA在多样化的用户、设备及嘈杂环境中依然有效，凸显其在实际应用中的持续安全风险。

title: ELAS: Efficient Pre-Training of Low-Rank Large Language Models via 2:4 Activation Sparsity
authors: Jiaxi Li, Lu Yin, Li Shen, Jinjin Xu, Yuhui Liu, Wenwu Wang, Shiwei Liu, Xilu Wang
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable capabilities, but their immense computational demands during training remain a critical bottleneck for widespread adoption. Low-rank training has received attention in recent years due to its ability to significantly reduce training memory usage. Meanwhile, applying 2:4 structured sparsity to weights and activations to leverage NVIDIA GPU support for 2:4 structured sparse format has become a promising direction. However, existing low-rank methods often leave activation matrices in full-rank, which dominates memory consumption and limits throughput during large-batch training. Furthermore, directly applying sparsity to weights often leads to non-negligible performance degradation. To achieve efficient pre-training of LLMs, this paper proposes ELAS: Efficient pre-training of Low-rank LLMs via 2:4 Activation Sparsity, a novel framework for low-rank models via 2:4 activation sparsity. ELAS applies squared ReLU activation functions to the feed-forward networks in low-rank models and implements 2:4 structured sparsity on the activations after the squared ReLU operation. We evaluated ELAS through pre-training experiments on LLaMA models ranging from 60M to 1B parameters. The results demonstrate that ELAS maintains performance with minimal degradation after applying 2:4 activation sparsity, while achieving training and inference acceleration. Moreover, ELAS reduces activation memory overhead, particularly with large batch sizes. Code is available at ELAS Repo.
title_zh: ELAS：通过2:4激活稀疏性实现低秩大语言模型的高效预训练
abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型（LLMs）已展现出卓越的能力，但其在训练过程中巨大的计算需求仍是广泛采用的关键瓶颈。近年来，低秩训练因其能够显著降低训练内存消耗而受到关注。同时，将2:4结构化稀疏性应用于权重和激活以利用NVIDIA GPU对2:4结构化稀疏格式的支持，已成为一个极具前景的研究方向。然而，现有的低秩方法通常仍保留激活矩阵的全秩形式，这导致内存消耗占主导地位，并限制了大批次训练时的吞吐量。此外，直接对权重施加稀疏性往往会导致性能明显下降。为实现LLM的高效预训练，本文提出ELAS：通过2:4激活稀疏性实现低秩LLM的高效预训练，这是一种基于2:4激活稀疏性的新型低秩模型框架。ELAS在低秩模型的前馈网络中采用平方ReLU激活函数，并在平方ReLU运算后的激活上实施2:4结构化稀疏。我们通过在参数量从60M到1B的LLaMA模型上进行预训练实验评估了ELAS。结果表明，ELAS在应用2:4激活稀疏性后仅带来极小的性能损失，同时实现了训练与推理速度的提升。此外，ELAS显著降低了激活内存开销，尤其在大批次场景下优势明显。代码已开源，可访问ELAS仓库获取。

title: The Infinite Mutation Engine? Measuring Polymorphism in LLM-Generated Offensive Code
authors: Gabriel Hortea, Juan Tapiador
abstract: Malware authors have traditionally relied on polymorphic techniques to produce variants in the same malware family, complicating signature-based detection. Integrating generative AI into offensive toolchains enables attackers to synthesize structurally diverse payloads with identical behavior, raising the question of how much polymorphism LLMs provide. Recent work has assumed that LLMs can produce sufficiently polymorphic payloads, leaving unquantified the variation that emerges when an attacker repeatedly builds the same payload, or explicitly instructs the model to avoid prior implementations. In this work, we measure the polymorphic capacity of a commercial model (Claude Opus 4.6) as an automated malware generator. We build a dual-agent, four-stage pipeline that generates, tests, and refines a data-exfiltration payload comprising file traversal, encryption, exfiltration, and integration. We produce payloads in two settings: using prompts that specify only functional requirements, and using prompts that inject a structured history of prior outcomes to force divergence. We measure pairwise distances along structural (AST) and semantic (embedding) axes, finding that when polymorphism is not explicitly required, structural distances are high while semantic distances remain low; i.e., implementations diverge widely without changing high-level behavior. Explicit prompting substantially amplifies this structural diversity while preserving correctness, at the cost of roughly 5 times more tokens but only a small increase in LLM calls (from $4.2$ to $4.5$ per payload, with effective API costs of \$0.41 and \$0.73). These results show that a single commercial LLM can cheaply generate large populations of behaviorally equivalent yet structurally diverse payloads, facilitating the evasion of signature-based detection rules and similarity-based clustering.
title_zh: 无限变异引擎？衡量大语言模型生成的攻击性代码中的多态性
abstract_zh: 恶意软件作者传统上依赖多态技术生成同一恶意软件家族的变种，从而增加基于特征码的检测难度。将生成式人工智能整合进攻击工具链，使攻击者能够合成结构各异但行为相同的载荷，这引发了关于大型语言模型（LLM）能提供多大程度多态性的疑问。近期研究普遍假设LLM可生成足够多样化的载荷，但并未量化当攻击者反复构建同一载荷，或明确指令模型避免先前实现时所产生的实际变化。在本研究中，我们以商用模型Claude Opus 4.6为自动化恶意软件生成器，测量其多态生成能力。我们构建了一个双代理、四阶段的流水线，用于生成、测试并优化一个包含文件遍历、加密、数据外传和集成功能的数据窃取载荷。我们在两种场景下生成载荷：一种是仅指定功能需求的提示；另一种是在提示中注入先前结果的结构化历史，以强制生成差异性实现。我们沿结构（AST）与语义（嵌入向量）两个维度度量了载荷间的成对距离，发现当未显式要求多态性时，结构距离较高而语义距离保持较低——即实现方式广泛分化，但高层行为保持一致。通过显式提示，结构多样性显著增强，同时仍保持正确性，代价约为token消耗增加约5倍，但LLM调用次数仅小幅上升（从每载荷4.2次增至4.5次），有效API成本分别为0.41美元和0.73美元。这些结果表明，单一商用LLM可低成本生成大量行为等价但结构各异的载荷，从而有效规避基于特征码的检测规则及基于相似性的聚类分析。

title: Mitigating False Positives in Static Memory Safety Analysis of Rust Programs via Reinforcement Learning
authors: P Akilesh, Leuson Da Silva, Foutse Khomh, Sridhar Chimalakonda
abstract: Static analysis tools are essential for ensuring memory safety in Rust programs, particularly as Rust gains adoption in safety-critical domains. However, existing tools such as Rudra and MirChecker suffer from high false positive rates, which diminish developer trust, increase manual review effort, and may obscure genuine vulnerabilities. This paper presents a novel reinforcement learning (RL)-based approach for automatically classifying and suppressing spurious warnings in static memory safety analysis for Rust. To achieve this, we design an RL agent that learns a warning suppression policy by extracting contextual features from Rust's Mid-level Intermediate Representation (MIR) and optimizing its decisions through interaction with static analysis outputs. To improve decision quality, we integrate dynamic validation via cargo-fuzz as an auxiliary feedback mechanism, allowing the agent to selectively validate suspicious warnings through targeted fuzz testing. Our evaluation shows that the proposed approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based baselines, achieving 65.2% accuracy and an F1 score of 0.659, an improvement of 17.1% over the best LLM baseline. With a recall of 74.6%, our method successfully identifies nearly three-quarters of true bugs while substantially reducing false positives, improving precision from 25.6% in raw Rudra output to 59.0%. Incorporating dynamic fuzzing further boosts performance, yielding additional improvements of 10.7 percentage points in accuracy and 8.6 percentage points in F1 score over the RL-only variant. Overall, our work demonstrates that combining reinforcement learning with hybrid static-dynamic analysis can substantially reduce false positives and improve the practical usability of memory safety verification tools for Rust.
title_zh: 通过强化学习缓解 Rust 程序静态内存安全分析中的误报问题
abstract_zh: 静态分析工具对于确保 Rust 程序的内存安全至关重要，尤其是在 Rust 被越来越多地应用于安全关键领域的情况下。然而，现有的工具如 Rudra 和 MirChecker 存在误报率过高的问题，这降低了开发者的信任度，增加了人工审查的工作量，并可能掩盖真正的漏洞。本文提出了一种基于强化学习（Reinforcement Learning, RL）的新方法，用于自动分类并抑制 Rust 静态内存安全分析中的虚假警告。为此，我们设计了一个强化学习智能体，通过从 Rust 的中层中间表示（MIR）中提取上下文特征，并根据与静态分析结果的交互不断优化其决策，从而学习一种警告抑制策略。为了提升决策质量，我们引入了通过 cargo-fuzz 实现的动态验证作为辅助反馈机制，使智能体能够针对可疑警告进行有针对性的模糊测试验证。评估结果表明，所提方法显著优于当前最先进的基于大语言模型（LLM）的基线方案，达到了 65.2% 的准确率和 0.659 的 F1 分数，较最佳 LLM 基线提升了 17.1%。在召回率达到 74.6% 的情况下，该方法成功识别出近四分之三的真实缺陷，同时大幅降低误报率——将原始 Rudra 输出的精确率从 25.6% 提升至 59.0%。进一步引入动态模糊测试后，性能得到进一步提升：相较于仅使用 RL 的变体，准确率提高 10.7 个百分点，F1 分数提高 8.6 个百分点。总体而言，本研究证明，将强化学习与混合式静态-动态分析相结合，能够显著减少误报，大幅提升 Rust 内存安全验证工具的实际可用性。

title: From Intent to Execution: Composing Agentic Workflows with Agent Recommendation
authors: Kishan Athrey, Ramin Pishehvar, Brian Riordan, Mahesh Viswanathan
abstract: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built using AI agents fulfill a variety of user intents that may be used to design and build a family of related applications. However, the creation of such MAS currently involves manual composition of the plan, manual selection of appropriate agents, and manual creation of execution graphs. This paper introduces a framework for the automated creation of multi-agent systems which replaces multiple manual steps with an automated framework. The proposed framework consists of software modules and a workflow to orchestrate the requisite task- specific application. The modules include: an LLM-derived planner, a set of tasks described in natural language, a dynamic call graph, an orchestrator for map agents to tasks, and an agent recommender that finds the most suitable agent(s) from local and global agent registries. The agent recommender uses a two-stage information retrieval (IR) system comprising a fast retriever and an LLM-based re-ranker. We implemented a series of experiments exploring the choice of embedders, re- rankers, agent description enrichment, and supervising critique agent. We benchmarked this system end-to-end, evaluating the combination of planning, agent selection, and task completion, with our proposed approach. Our experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the- art in terms of the recall rate and is more robust and scalable compared to previous approaches. The critique agent holistically reevaluates both agent and tool recommendations against the overall plan. We show that the inclusion of the critique agent further enhances the recall score, proving that the comprehensive review and revision of task-based agent selection is an essential step in building end-to-end multi-agent systems.
title_zh: 从意图到执行：通过代理推荐构建智能工作流
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能代理构建的多智能体系统（MAS）能够满足多种用户意图，可用于设计和开发一系列相关应用。然而，当前构建此类MAS的过程涉及手动规划、手动选择合适的代理以及手动创建执行图等多个步骤。本文提出了一种自动化创建多智能体系统的框架，将多个手动环节替换为自动化流程。该框架由若干软件模块及工作流组成，用于协调特定任务的应用程序。其核心模块包括：基于大语言模型（LLM）的规划器、以自然语言描述的任务集合、动态调用图、负责将代理映射到任务的编排器，以及一个从本地和全局代理注册表中检索最适配代理的代理推荐器。该代理推荐器采用两级信息检索（IR）系统，包含快速检索器与基于LLM的重排序器。我们实施了一系列实验，探索了嵌入模型（embedders）、重排序器、代理描述增强以及监督式批判代理的选择对系统性能的影响。我们在端到端层面进行了基准测试，评估了规划、代理选择与任务完成三者结合的整体表现。实验结果表明，与现有最先进方法相比，本方法在召回率方面表现更优，并且具备更强的鲁棒性与可扩展性。此外，批判代理会对整体计划下的代理与工具推荐进行整体性重新评估。实验进一步证明，引入批判代理能显著提升召回率，充分说明对基于任务的代理选择进行全面审查与修正，是构建端到端多智能体系统不可或缺的关键步骤。

title: Revisiting the Travel Planning Capabilities of Large Language Models
authors: Bo-Wen Zhang, Jin Ye, Peng-Yu Hua, Jia-Wei Cao, Jie-Jing Shao, Yu-Feng Li, Lan-Zhe Guo
abstract: Travel planning serves as a critical task for long-horizon reasoning, exposing significant deficits in LLMs. However, existing benchmarks and evaluations primarily assess final plans in an end-to-end manner, which lacks interpretability and makes it difficult to analyze the root causes of failures. To bridge this gap, we decompose travel planning into five constituent atomic sub-capabilities, including \emph{Constraint Extraction}, \emph{Tool Use}, \emph{Plan Generation}, \emph{Error Identification}, and \emph{Error Correction}. We implement a decoupled evaluation protocol leveraging oracle intermediate contexts to rigorously isolate these components, thereby measuring the atomic performance boundary without the noise of cascading errors. Our results highlight a clear contrast in performance: while LLMs are proficient in extracting explicit constraints, they struggle to infer implicit, open-world requirements. Furthermore, they exhibit structural biases in plan generation and suffer from ineffective self-correction, characterized by excessive sensitivity and erroneous persistence. These findings offer precise directions for improving LLM reasoning and planning abilities.
title_zh: 重新审视大型语言模型的旅行规划能力
abstract_zh: 旅行规划是长时程推理中一项关键任务，暴露出大语言模型（LLMs）存在的显著缺陷。然而，现有的评估基准和评测方法主要以端到端的方式评估最终计划，缺乏可解释性，难以分析失败的根本原因。为弥补这一差距，我们将旅行规划分解为五个基本的原子子能力：*约束提取*、*工具使用*、*计划生成*、*错误识别*和*错误修正*。我们设计了一种解耦的评估协议，利用“神谕”中间上下文来严格隔离这些组件，从而在不受级联错误干扰的情况下，精确测量各项能力的性能边界。实验结果揭示出明显的性能差异：尽管大语言模型在提取显式约束方面表现良好，但在推断隐含的、开放世界中的需求方面存在明显困难。此外，它们在计划生成中表现出结构性偏差，并且自我修正能力低下，表现为过度敏感以及错误的持续性。这些发现为提升大语言模型的推理与规划能力提供了精准的方向。

title: RAG over Thinking Traces Can Improve Reasoning Tasks
authors: Negar Arabzadeh, Wenjie Ma, Sewon Min, Matei Zaharia
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has proven effective for knowledge-intensive tasks, but is widely believed to offer limited benefit for reasoning-intensive problems such as math and code generation. We challenge this assumption by showing that the limitation lies not in RAG itself, but in the choice of corpus. Instead of retrieving documents, we propose retrieving thinking traces, i.e., intermediate thinking trajectories generated during problem solving attempts. We show that thinking traces are already a strong retrieval source, and further introduce T3, an offline method that transforms them into structured, retrieval-friendly representations, to improve usability. Using these traces as a corpus, a simple retrieve-then-generate pipeline consistently improves reasoning performance across strong models and benchmarks such as AIME 2025--2026, LiveCodeBench, and GPQA-Diamond, outperforming both non-RAG baselines and retrieval over standard web corpora. For instance, on AIME, RAG with traces generated by Gemini-2-thinking achieves relative gains of +56.3%, +8.6%, and +7.6% for Gemini-2.5-Flash, GPT-OSS-120B, and GPT-5, respectively, even though these are more recent models. Interestingly, RAG on T3 also incurs little or no extra inference cost, and can even reduce inference cost by up to $15%$. Overall, our results suggest that thinking traces are an effective retrieval corpus for reasoning tasks, and transforming them into structured, compact, or diagnostic representations unlocks even stronger gains. Code available at https://github.com/Narabzad/t3.
title_zh: 基于思维轨迹的RAG可提升推理任务表现
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）在知识密集型任务中已被证明非常有效，但人们普遍认为它对数学和代码生成等需要深度推理的问题帮助有限。我们挑战这一观点，指出问题并不在于RAG本身，而在于所选语料库的不当。与传统地检索文档不同，我们提出应检索“思维轨迹”——即在解题尝试过程中生成的中间思考路径。我们发现，思维轨迹本身已是强大的检索资源；在此基础上，我们进一步提出了T3，一种离线方法，可将这些轨迹转化为结构化、便于检索的表示形式，从而提升其可用性。以这些思维轨迹作为语料库，一个简单的“先检索后生成”流程，在多个强大模型和基准测试（如AIME 2025–2026、LiveCodeBench 和 GPQA-Diamond）上均持续提升了推理性能，不仅优于非RAG基线，也超越了基于标准网络语料库的检索方法。例如，在AIME任务中，使用Gemini-2-thinking生成的思维轨迹进行RAG，对Gemini-2.5-Flash、GPT-OSS-120B和GPT-5分别实现了+56.3%、+8.6%和+7.6%的相对性能提升，尽管这些模型均为较新版本。有趣的是，基于T3的RAG几乎不增加额外推理开销，甚至可将推理成本降低高达15%。总体而言，我们的结果表明，思维轨迹是推理任务中有效的检索语料库，而将其转化为结构化、紧凑或具有诊断性的表示形式，能进一步释放更强的性能增益。代码已开源：https://github.com/Narabzad/t3。

title: Deep Graph-Language Fusion for Structure-Aware Code Generation
authors: Mert Tiftikci, Amir Molzam Sharifloo, Mira Mezini
abstract: Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) have the potential to transform software development tasks. However, despite significant advances, current PLMs struggle to capture the structured and relational attributes of code, such as control flow and data dependencies. This limitation is rooted in an architectural mismatch: whereas code structure is best represented by graphs, transformer-based LLMs process input as sequential token patterns and therefore lack explicit structural awareness. While recent research has explored integrating graph-based code representations using techniques like graph feature extraction, retrieval-augmented generation, and prompt engineering, existing approaches suffer from information loss during dense feature extraction or prompt encoding; notably, the potential of deep, token-level fusion of graph features within model internals has not been systematically explored. In this paper, we initiate such an exploration by introducing CGFuse, a novel framework that enables token-level integration of graph-derived representations by infusing learned graph features directly into the intermediate layers of pre-trained language models. CGFuse combines a graph neural network (GNN) with a language model to explicitly preserve and exploit fine-grained structural information from code graphs, including abstract syntax trees and data-flow graphs. We systematically evaluate CGFuse across multiple LLMs, demonstrating up to 10-16% BLEU and 6-11% CodeBLEU improvements in code generation performance. These results highlight the potential of deep graph-PLM integration to advance the field toward more robust, capable AI-driven software development.
title_zh: 面向结构感知的代码生成深度图-语言融合方法
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型（PLMs）有潜力彻底改变软件开发任务。然而，尽管取得了显著进展，当前的PLMs在捕捉代码的结构化和关系属性方面仍存在困难，例如控制流和数据依赖性。这一局限性的根源在于架构上的不匹配：代码结构最适合用图来表示，而基于Transformer的大型语言模型则将输入处理为顺序的标记序列，因此缺乏显式的结构感知能力。虽然近期研究已探索通过图特征提取、检索增强生成以及提示工程等技术整合基于图的代码表示，但现有方法在密集特征提取或提示编码过程中仍存在信息丢失问题；尤其值得注意的是，尚未系统地探索在模型内部深层进行图特征与标记层面融合的潜力。本文首次开启这一探索，提出CGFuse——一种新型框架，通过将学习到的图特征直接注入预训练语言模型的中间层，实现标记级别的图衍生表示集成。CGFuse结合图神经网络（GNN）与语言模型，能够显式地保留并利用代码图中的细粒度结构信息，包括抽象语法树和数据流图。我们在多个大型语言模型上对CGFuse进行了系统评估，结果显示其在代码生成性能上实现了高达10-16%的BLEU提升和6-11%的CodeBLEU提升。这些结果凸显了深度图-PLM融合在推动AI驱动软件开发迈向更稳健、更强大的方向上的巨大潜力。

title: ProgramBench: Can Language Models Rebuild Programs From Scratch?
authors: John Yang, Kilian Lieret, Jeffrey Ma, Parth Thakkar, Dmitrii Pedchenko, Sten Sootla, Emily McMilin, Pengcheng Yin, Rui Hou, Gabriel Synnaeve, Diyi Yang, Ofir Press
abstract: Turning ideas into full software projects from scratch has become a popular use case for language models. Agents are being deployed to seed, maintain, and grow codebases over extended periods with minimal human oversight. Such settings require models to make high-level software architecture decisions. However, existing benchmarks measure focused, limited tasks such as fixing a single bug or developing a single, specified feature. We therefore introduce ProgramBench to measure the ability of software engineering agents to develop software holisitically. In ProgramBench, given only a program and its documentation, agents must architect and implement a codebase that matches the reference executable's behavior. End-to-end behavioral tests are generated via agent-driven fuzzing, enabling evaluation without prescribing implementation structure. Our 200 tasks range from compact CLI tools to widely used software such as FFmpeg, SQLite, and the PHP interpreter. We evaluate 9 LMs and find that none fully resolve any task, with the best model passing 95\% of tests on only 3\% of tasks. Models favor monolithic, single-file implementations that diverge sharply from human-written code.
title_zh: ProgramBench：语言模型能否从零开始重建程序？
abstract_zh: 将想法从零开始转化为完整的软件项目，已成为语言模型的一个流行应用场景。如今，智能体被部署用于在长时间内自主创建、维护和扩展代码库，且几乎无需人工干预。这类场景要求模型能够做出高层次的软件架构决策。然而，现有的评估基准大多仅衡量特定、有限的任务，例如修复单一缺陷或开发一个明确指定的功能。因此，我们提出了 ProgramBench，用以评估软件工程智能体在整体性开发软件方面的能力。在 ProgramBench 中，智能体仅根据一个程序及其文档，需自行设计并实现一个与参考可执行文件行为一致的代码库。通过智能体驱动的模糊测试自动生成端到端的行为测试，从而实现无需预设实现结构的评估方式。我们的 200 个任务涵盖从紧凑的命令行工具到广泛使用的软件（如 FFmpeg、SQLite 和 PHP 解释器）等多种类型。我们对 9 个大语言模型进行了评估，发现没有一个模型能完全解决任何一项任务，表现最好的模型也仅在 3% 的任务中通过了 95% 的测试。此外，这些模型倾向于采用庞大单一文件的实现方式，与人类编写的代码结构存在显著差异。

title: Revisiting Graph-Tokenizing Large Language Models: A Systematic Evaluation of Graph Token Understanding
authors: Zhongjian Zhang, Yue Yu, Mengmei Zhang, Junping Du, Xiao Wang, Chuan Shi
abstract: The remarkable success of large language models (LLMs) has motivated researchers to adapt them as universal predictors for various graph tasks. As a widely recognized paradigm, Graph-Tokenizing LLMs (GTokenLLMs) compress complex graph data into graph tokens and treat them as prefix tokens for querying LLMs, leading many to believe that LLMs can understand graphs more effectively and efficiently. In this paper, we challenge this belief: \textit{Do GTokenLLMs fully understand graph tokens in the natural-language embedding space?} Motivated by this question, we formalize a unified framework for GTokenLLMs and propose an evaluation pipeline, \textbf{GTEval}, to assess graph-token understanding via instruction transformations at the format and content levels. We conduct extensive experiments on 6 representative GTokenLLMs with GTEval. The primary findings are as follows: (1) Existing GTokenLLMs do not fully understand graph tokens. They exhibit over-sensitivity or over-insensitivity to instruction changes, and rely heavily on text for reasoning; (2) Although graph tokens preserve task-relevant graph information and receive attention across LLM layers, their utilization varies across models and instruction variants; (3) Additional instruction tuning can improve performance on the original and seen instructions, but it does not fully address the challenge of graph-token understanding, calling for further improvement.
title_zh: 重新审视图标记化大语言模型：对图标记理解的系统性评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）取得的显著成功，促使研究人员尝试将其适配为各种图任务的通用预测器。作为一种广受认可的方法，图标记化语言模型（GTokenLLMs）将复杂的图数据压缩为图标记，并将其作为前缀标记用于查询大型语言模型，这使得许多人相信，LLMs能够更有效、更高效地理解图结构。在本文中，我们对这一信念提出质疑：\textit{GTokenLLMs 是否在自然语言嵌入空间中真正理解了图标记？} 基于这一问题，我们提出了一个统一的GTokenLLM框架，并设计了一套评估流程——\textbf{GTEval}，通过在格式和内容两个层面进行指令变换，来评估模型对图标记的理解能力。我们在6种具有代表性的GTokenLLMs上进行了广泛的实验。主要发现如下：（1）现有的GTokenLLMs并未完全理解图标记，它们对指令变化表现出过度敏感或过度迟钝，且严重依赖文本信息进行推理；（2）尽管图标记保留了与任务相关的关键图信息，并在LLM各层中获得关注，但其实际利用程度因模型和指令变体的不同而存在显著差异；（3）额外的指令微调虽能提升模型在原始及已见指令上的表现，却无法彻底解决图标记理解的挑战，表明仍需进一步改进。

title: From TinyGo to gc Compiler: Extending Zorya's Concolic Framework to Real-World Go Binaries
authors: Karolina Gorna, Nicolas Iooss, Yannick Seurin, Rida Khatoun, Keith Makan
abstract: Zorya is a concolic execution framework that lifts compiled binaries to Ghidra's P-Code intermediate representation and uses the Z3 SMT solver to detect vulnerabilities by reasoning over both concrete and symbolic values. Previous versions supported only single-threaded TinyGo binaries. In this paper, we extend Zorya to multi-threaded binaries produced by Go's standard gc compiler. This is achieved by restoring OS thread states from gdb dumps, neutralizing runtime preemption, and introducing overlay path analysis with copy-on-write semantics to detect silent vulnerabilities on untaken branches. We rigorously assess Zorya on 11 real-world vulnerabilities from production Go projects such as Kubernetes, Go-Ethereum, and CoreDNS. Our evaluation shows that Zorya detects seven bugs at the binary level, including a silent integer overflow detects no other evaluated tool finds without a manually written oracle.
title_zh: 从TinyGo到gc编译器：将Zorya的符号执行框架扩展至真实世界的Go二进制文件
abstract_zh: Zorya 是一个协同执行（concolic execution）框架，它将编译后的二进制文件提升至 Ghidra 的 P-Code 中间表示，并利用 Z3 SMT 求解器通过同时推理具体值和符号值来检测漏洞。此前的版本仅支持单线程的 TinyGo 二进制文件。在本文中，我们扩展了 Zorya 的能力，使其能够处理由 Go 标准 gc 编译器生成的多线程二进制文件。这一目标通过从 gdb 转储中恢复操作系统线程状态、消除运行时抢占机制，并引入具有写时复制语义的重叠路径分析技术来实现，从而能够检测未执行分支上的隐蔽漏洞。我们在来自生产环境 Go 项目（如 Kubernetes、Go-Ethereum 和 CoreDNS）的 11 个真实漏洞上对 Zorya 进行了严格评估。结果表明，Zorya 在二进制层面成功检测到了七个漏洞，其中包括一个隐蔽的整数溢出问题——该问题未被其他任何已评估工具发现，且无需人工编写断言（oracle）。

title: POSTCONDBENCH: Benchmarking Correctness and Completeness in Formal Postcondition Inference
authors: Gehao Zhang, Juan Zhai
abstract: Formal postconditions precisely characterize program behavior and support debugging, testing, and verification, but writing them requires substantial expertise and effort. This has motivated recent work on automatically generating postconditions from code and natural-language artifacts using large language models (LLMs). However, evaluation remains a key bottleneck. Existing benchmarks primarily emphasize correctness under limited evaluation settings, often relying on surface-form matching or manual assessment on small or synthetic datasets. We introduce POSTCONDBENCH, a multilingual benchmark for evaluating method-level postcondition generation from real-world software. POSTCONDBENCH comprises 420 Python and Java tasks drawn from 121 open-source projects, each paired with a high-quality ground-truth postcondition set constructed with expert involvement. To enable automatic evaluation, POSTCONDBENCH provides a runnable execution environment and operationalizes completeness via defect discrimination: a postcondition set is more complete if it is violated by more defective implementations while remaining satisfied on correct executions. Using POSTCONDBENCH, we formulate three generation settings and evaluate five SOTA LLMs. Our results reveal a substantial gap between correctness and completeness, and show that repository-level dependencies and method complexity exacerbate this gap.
title_zh: POSTCONDBENCH：形式后置条件推断中的正确性与完备性基准测试
abstract_zh: 形式化后置条件能够精确描述程序行为，有助于调试、测试和验证，但编写这些后置条件需要大量专业知识和精力。这促使近期研究利用大语言模型（LLMs）从代码和自然语言文档中自动生成后置条件。然而，评估仍是主要瓶颈。现有基准主要关注在有限评估环境下的正确性，通常依赖表面形式匹配或对小规模或合成数据集的人工评估。我们提出了POSTCONDBENCH，这是一个多语言基准，用于评估从真实世界软件中生成方法级后置条件的能力。POSTCONDBENCH 包含来自 121 个开源项目的 420 个 Python 和 Java 任务，每个任务均配有由专家参与构建的高质量真实后置条件集。为支持自动化评估，POSTCONDBENCH 提供了可运行的执行环境，并通过缺陷识别来实现完整性度量：若一个后置条件集能被更多有缺陷的实现所违反，同时仍满足正确执行，则认为其更完整。基于 POSTCONDBENCH，我们设计了三种生成场景，并评估了五种当前最先进的 LLMs。结果揭示了正确性与完整性之间存在显著差距，且发现项目级依赖关系和方法复杂性会加剧这一差距。

title: Tailored Prompts, Targeted Protection: Vulnerability-Specific LLM Analysis for Smart Contracts
authors: Xing Zhang, Keyu Zhang, Taohong Zhu, Anbang Ruan
abstract: Smart contracts on blockchains are prone to diverse security vulnerabilities that can lead to significant financial losses due to their immutable nature. Existing detection approaches often lack flexibility across vulnerability types and rely heavily on manually crafted expert rules. In this paper, we present an LLM-based framework for practical smart contract vulnerability detection. We construct and release a large-scale dataset comprising 31,165 professionally annotated vulnerability instances collected from over 3,200 real-world projects across 15 major blockchain platforms. Our approach leverages precise AST-based context extraction and vulnerability-specific prompt design to instantiate customized detectors for 13 prevalent vulnerability categories. Experimental results demonstrate strong effectiveness, achieving an average positive recall of 0.92 and an average negative recall of 0.85, highlighting the potential of carefully engineered contextual prompting for scalable and high-precision smart contract security analysis.
title_zh: 量身定制的提示，精准防护：针对漏洞的智能合约专用大模型分析
abstract_zh: 区块链上的智能合约容易受到多种安全漏洞的影响，由于其不可更改的特性，这些漏洞可能导致重大的财务损失。现有的检测方法通常在不同类型的漏洞之间缺乏灵活性，且严重依赖于人工编写的专家规则。本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的实用型智能合约漏洞检测框架。我们构建并发布了一个大规模数据集，包含从15个主要区块链平台上的3,200多个真实项目中收集的31,165个专业标注的漏洞实例。我们的方法通过精确的AST（抽象语法树）上下文提取和针对特定漏洞的提示设计，为13种常见的漏洞类别定制了专用检测器。实验结果表明，该方法具有出色的检测效果，平均正向召回率达到0.92，平均负向召回率达到0.85，凸显了精心设计的上下文提示在实现可扩展、高精度智能合约安全分析方面的巨大潜力。

title: Multi-Agent Systems for Root Cause Analysis in Microservices
authors: Alexander Naakka, Yuqing Wang, Mika V Mäntylä
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled early attempts to automate root cause analysis (RCA) in microservice-based systems (MSS). Yet, prior works typically rely on a linear reasoning process that proceeds along a single diagnostic path. In this paper, we propose LATS-RCA, an LLM-based multi-agent framework for RCA in MSS. LATS-RCA formulates RCA as a reflection-guided tree-structured search using a Language Agent Tree Search algorithm. In LATS-RCA, multiple LLM-driven agents iteratively perform RCA for each microservice by reasoning over its execution logs and performance metrics to collect operational evidence for root cause exploration. Reflection scores derived from intermediate diagnostic states are used to guide the search toward the most likely root cause based on accumulated evidence. We evaluate LATS-RCA on the open-source industrial MSS, Light-OAuth2 (LO2), using a publicly available dataset and in a production microservice environment (Prod) in a case company with substantially higher operational complexity. LO2 is a small-team Java system with a homogeneous technology stack. The results on LO2 show that LATS-RCA achieves high diagnostic accuracy, and we further benchmark its associated computational costs. Compared to LO2, Prod attains lower diagnostic accuracy and incurs higher computational cost. The Prod deployment demonstrates the practical applicability of LATS-RCA in real-world MSS and reflects the challenges introduced by polyglot tech stack, varied logging practices of source components, and multi-factor root-causes by production-scale MSS.
title_zh: 微服务中的多智能体系统用于根本原因分析
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的进展已推动了在微服务系统（MSS）中自动化根因分析（RCA）的初步尝试。然而，以往的研究通常依赖于线性推理过程，仅沿着单一诊断路径进行分析。本文提出LATS-RCA，一种基于LLM的多智能体框架，用于MSS中的RCA。LATS-RCA将RCA建模为一种由反思引导的树状结构搜索，采用语言智能体树搜索算法（Language Agent Tree Search）。在LATS-RCA中，多个由LLM驱动的智能体通过迭代推理各微服务的执行日志和性能指标，收集操作证据以探索潜在的根因。基于中间诊断状态计算出的反思评分，指导搜索过程向最可能的根因方向推进，依据累积的证据不断优化判断。我们在开源工业级MSS Light-OAuth2（LO2）上评估了LATS-RCA，使用公开数据集，并在一家公司的真实生产环境（Prod）中进行了测试，该环境具有显著更高的运营复杂性。LO2是一个由小团队维护、采用同质技术栈的Java系统。在LO2上的实验结果表明，LATS-RCA实现了较高的诊断准确率，我们还对其相关的计算开销进行了基准测试。相比之下，Prod环境下的诊断准确率较低，且计算成本更高。Prod部署的结果验证了LATS-RCA在真实世界MSS中的实际应用潜力，同时也揭示了生产规模MSS带来的挑战：异构技术栈、不同组件间不一致的日志记录实践，以及多因素共同导致的根因问题。

title: MCJudgeBench: A Benchmark for Constraint-Level Judge Evaluation in Multi-Constraint Instruction Following
authors: Jaeyun Lee, Junyoung Koh, Zeynel Tok, Hunar Batra, Ronald Clark
abstract: Multi-constraint instruction following requires verifying whether a response satisfies multiple individual requirements, yet LLM judges are often assessed only through overall-response judgments. We introduce MCJudgeBench, a benchmark for constraint-level judge evaluation in multi-constraint instruction following. Each instance includes an instruction, a candidate response, an explicit constraint list, per-constraint gold labels in {yes, partial, no}, and controlled response-side perturbations. The evaluation protocol further includes evaluation prompt variants to test judge stability. We evaluate proprietary and open-source LLM judges using both correctness and inconsistency metrics, distinguishing intrinsic inconsistency under stochastic decoding from procedural inconsistency under prompt and response perturbations. Our results show that judge reliability has multiple dimensions: strong overall performance does not guarantee equally reliable detection across label categories, especially for rarer partial and no cases. Judges with higher correctness do not always have lower inconsistency. Evaluation with reasoning improves correctness but does not uniformly improve stability. These findings motivate evaluating LLM judges at the constraint level to study these failure modes.
title_zh: MCJudgeBench：多约束指令遵循中的约束级别评判评估基准
abstract_zh: 多约束指令遵循要求验证响应是否满足多个独立的要求，然而当前大语言模型（LLM）的评估通常仅基于整体响应判断。为此，我们提出了MCJudgeBench，这是一个用于多约束指令遵循中约束级别判断评估的基准测试。每个测试实例包含：一条指令、一个候选响应、一份明确的约束列表，以及针对每项约束的黄金标签（取值为“是”、“部分”或“否”），同时还包含受控的响应侧扰动。评估协议进一步引入了多种评估提示变体，以检验判断者的稳定性。我们使用正确性与不一致性指标，对专有和开源LLM判断者进行了评估，区分了在随机解码下的内在不一致性，以及在提示和响应扰动下的程序性不一致性。实验结果表明，判断可靠性具有多个维度：整体表现优异并不意味着在各类标签（尤其是较少见的“部分”和“否”类）上同样可靠。正确率更高的判断者并不一定具有更低的不一致性。引入推理过程可提升正确性，但并未统一改善稳定性。这些发现强调了在约束层面评估LLM判断者的重要性，以便深入研究其失效模式。

title: Evaluating Generative Models as Interactive Emergent Representations of Human-Like Collaborative Behavior
authors: Shinas Shaji, Teena Chakkalayil Hassan, Sebastian Houben, Alex Mitrevski
abstract: Human-AI collaboration requires AI agents to understand human behavior for effective coordination. While advances in foundation models show promising capabilities in understanding and showing human-like behavior, their application in embodied collaborative settings needs further investigation. This work examines whether embodied foundation model agents exhibit emergent collaborative behaviors indicating underlying mental models of their collaborators, which is an important aspect of effective coordination. This paper develops a 2D collaborative game environment where large language model agents and humans complete color-matching tasks requiring coordination. We define five collaborative behaviors as indicators of emergent mental model representation: perspective-taking, collaborator-aware planning, introspection, theory of mind, and clarification. An automated behavior detection system using LLM-based judges identifies these behaviors, achieving fair to substantial agreement with human annotations. Results from the automated behavior detection system show that foundation models consistently exhibit emergent collaborative behaviors without being explicitly trained to do so. These behaviors occur at varying frequencies during collaboration stages, with distinct patterns across different LLMs. A user study was also conducted to evaluate human satisfaction and perceived collaboration effectiveness, with the results indicating positive collaboration experiences. Participants appreciated the agents' task focus, plan verbalization, and initiative, while suggesting improvements in response times and human-like interactions. This work provides an experimental framework for human-AI collaboration, empirical evidence of collaborative behaviors in embodied LLM agents, a validated behavioral analysis methodology, and an assessment of collaboration effectiveness.
title_zh: 评估生成模型作为类人协作行为的交互式涌现表征
abstract_zh: 人机协作要求AI代理能够理解人类行为，以实现有效的协同。尽管基础模型在理解和展现类人行为方面取得了显著进展，但其在具身协作场景中的应用仍需进一步研究。本文探讨了具身基础模型代理是否表现出指示其对合作者存在潜在心理模型的涌现式协作行为，这是有效协调的重要方面。本研究构建了一个二维协作游戏环境，让大型语言模型代理与人类共同完成需要协调的颜色匹配任务。我们定义了五种协作行为作为涌现心理模型表征的指标：换位思考、合作者意识规划、自我反思、心智理论和澄清。通过基于大语言模型的评判系统自动检测这些行为，其与人工标注结果达到了良好至中等程度的一致性。自动化行为检测系统的实验结果表明，基础模型在未被显式训练的情况下，仍能持续表现出涌现式协作行为。这些行为在协作的不同阶段以不同频率出现，并且在不同LLM之间呈现出独特的模式。此外，我们还开展了一项用户研究，评估人类对协作体验的满意度及对协作效果的感知，结果显示参与者普遍获得了积极的协作体验。参与者赞赏代理的任务专注度、计划表述以及主动性，同时建议在响应速度和类人交互方面进行改进。本研究为人类-人工智能协作提供了一个实验框架，提供了具身LLM代理中协作行为的实证证据、经过验证的行为分析方法，以及对协作有效性评估的综合成果。

title: SkCC: Portable and Secure Skill Compilation for Cross-Framework LLM Agents
authors: Yipeng Ouyang, Yi Xiao, Yuhao Gu, Xianwei Zhang
abstract: LLM-Agents have evolved into autonomous systems for complex task execution, with the SKILL.md specification emerging as a de facto standard for encapsulating agent capabilities. However, a critical bottleneck remains: different agent frameworks exhibit starkly different sensitivities to prompt formatting, causing up to 40% performance variation, yet nearly all skills exist as a single, format-agnostic Markdown version. Manual per-platform rewriting creates an unsustainable maintenance burden, while prior audits have found that over one third of community skills contain security vulnerabilities. To address this, we present SkCC, a compilation framework that introduces classical compiler design into agent skill development. At its core, SkIR - a strongly-typed intermediate representation - decouples skill semantics from platform-specific formatting, enabling portable deployment across heterogeneous agent frameworks. Around this IR, a compile-time Analyzer enforces security constraints via Anti-Skill Injection before deployment. Through a four-phase pipeline, SkCC reduces adaptation complexity from $O(m \times n)$ to $O(m + n)$. Experiments on SkillsBench demonstrate that compiled skills consistently outperform their original counterparts, improving pass rates from 21.1% to 33.3% on Claude Code and from 35.1% to 48.7% on Kimi CLI, while achieving sub-10ms compilation latency, a 94.8% proactive security trigger rate, and 10-46% runtime token savings across platforms.
title_zh: SkCC：面向跨框架大模型代理的便携式安全技能编译
abstract_zh: LLM-Agents 已演進為可自主執行複雜任務的系統，而 SKILL.md 規範也逐漸成為封裝代理能力的實際標準。然而，一個關鍵瓶頸依然存在：不同代理框架對提示格式的敏感度差異顯著，導致性能波動高達 40%，但幾乎所有技能僅以單一、格式無關的 Markdown 版本存在。針對各平台逐一手動重寫不僅維護成本過高，且先前審計發現，社區中超過三分之一的技能含有安全漏洞。為解決此問題，我們提出 SkCC——一種將傳統編譯器設計引入代理技能開發的編譯框架。其核心是 SkIR（強類型中間表示），它將技能語義與平台特定格式分離，實現跨異構代理框架的可移植部署。圍繞該中間表示，SkCC 在編譯時引入 Analyzer，通過「反技能注入」機制強制執行安全約束，確保部署前的安全性。透過四階段流水線，SkCC 將適配複雜度從 $O(m \times n)$ 降低至 $O(m + n)$。在 SkillsBench 上的實驗表明，經編譯的技能持續優於原始版本：在 Claude Code 上通過率由 21.1% 提升至 33.3%，在 Kimi CLI 上則由 35.1% 提升至 48.7%；同時實現低於 10ms 的編譯延遲，主動安全觸發率達 94.8%，並在各平台上實現 10%-46% 的運行時 token 節省。

title: Beyond Rules: LLM-Powered Linting for Quantum Programs
authors: Pietro Cassieri, Giuseppe Scanniello, Seung Yeob Shin, Fabrizio Pastore, Domenico Bianculli
abstract: As quantum computing transitions from theoretical experimentation to its practical application, the reliability of quantum software has become a critical bottleneck. Traditional static analysis techniques for quantum programs, primarily rule-based linters, are increasingly inadequate; they struggle to keep pace with rapidly evolving APIs and fail to capture complex, context-dependent quantum programming problems. This results in high maintenance overhead and limited detection capabilities. In this paper, we introduce LintQ-LLM+CoT and LintQ-LLM+RAG, novel approaches that redefine the detection of quantum programming problems by employing Large Language Models (LLMs) specialized, respectively, via Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that grounds the model's reasoning in a curated knowledge base of verified quantum programming problems and best practices. We conducted a rigorous and manual comparative evaluation against the state-of-the-art rule-based tool, LintQ, using a corpus of 55 Qiskit programs. Our results show that LLM-based approaches, with and without RAG, outperform LintQ in terms of quantum programming problems detection correctness (precision) and completeness (recall). Overall, LLM-based approaches were more effective than LintQ (F1-score equal to 0.70 and 0.68 vs. 0.41). Furthermore, the RAG-enhanced variant demonstrated a slightly superior precision, effectively reducing false positives. Our findings suggest that LLMs provide a scalable and adaptive foundation for the next generation of linters in quantum software engineering.
title_zh: 超越规则：基于大语言模型的量子程序lint工具
abstract_zh: 随着量子计算从理论实验阶段迈向实际应用，量子软件的可靠性已成为一个关键瓶颈。传统的量子程序静态分析技术，主要依赖于基于规则的代码检查工具（linters），已越来越难以满足需求：它们难以跟上快速演进的API变化，也无法有效捕捉复杂且依赖上下文的量子编程问题，导致维护成本高企，检测能力有限。本文提出两种创新方法——LintQ-LLM+CoT 和 LintQ-LLM+RAG，通过引入专门针对量子编程问题优化的大语言模型（LLMs），重新定义了量子编程缺陷的检测方式。其中，前者采用思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）提示策略，后者则结合检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）系统，使模型的推理过程建立在经过验证的量子编程问题与最佳实践知识库之上。我们对这两种方法进行了严谨的手动对比评估，与当前最先进的基于规则的工具LintQ进行比较，使用了包含55个Qiskit程序的语料库。结果表明，无论是否采用RAG，基于LLM的方法在检测量子编程问题的准确率（precision）和覆盖率（recall）方面均优于LintQ。总体而言，LLM方法表现更优（F1分数分别为0.70和0.68，而LintQ仅为0.41）。此外，RAG增强版本展现出略高的准确率，有效降低了误报数量。研究结果表明，大语言模型为下一代量子软件工程中的代码检查工具提供了可扩展且自适应的技术基础。

title: From Code to Prediction: Fine-Tuning LLMs for Neural Network Performance Classification in NNGPT
authors: Mahmoud Hanouneh, Radu Timofte, Dmitry Ignatov
abstract: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) frameworks increasingly leverage Large Language Models (LLMs) for tasks such as hyperparameter optimization and neural architecture code generation. However, current LLM-based approaches focus on generative outputs and evaluate them by training the produced artifacts. Whether LLMs can learn to reason about neural network performance across datasets remains underexplored. We present a classification task integrated into the NNGPT framework, in which a fine-tuned LLM predicts which of two image classification datasets a given neural network architecture achieves higher accuracy on. The task is built on the LEMUR dataset, which provides standardized PyTorch implementations with reproducible performance metrics. Three prompt configurations of increasing difficulty are evaluated: a normalized-accuracy baseline (trivially reaching 100%), a metadata-enriched prompt replacing accuracies with dataset properties, and a code-only prompt presenting only architecture source code and dataset names. Using DeepSeek-Coder-7B-Instruct fine-tuned with LoRA, the code-only prompt reaches 80% peak accuracy over 15 epochs, while the metadata prompt peaks at 70%. Perdataset analysis reveals complementary strengths: metadata excels for datasets with distinctive properties (CelebAGender at 90.9%) but degrades for overlapping characteristics, whereas the code-only prompt shows more balanced performance. A comparison with DeepSeek-Coder1.3B confirms that model capacity affects this form of architectural reasoning.
